[Sun 2026-04-12 00:04 GMT-5] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/1). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]: ## Revisar schema de landing_steps en Supabase

### Objetivo
Verificar que la tabla `brands` en Supabase tiene todos los campos necesarios para los templates de mini-landings.

### Fuente de verdad
`/home/travis/Lookitry/Lookitry/backend/supabase-schema.sql`

### Campos a verificar en tabla `brands`
```sql
landing_steps jsonb,        -- debe tener:
  -- select_label
  -- select_desc  
  -- photo_label
  -- photo_desc
  -- result_label
  -- result_desc

landing_template varchar,    -- 'classic' | 'editorial' | 'moderno' | 'probador'
landing_font varchar,
widget_bg_color varchar,
header_color varchar,
cover_bg_color varchar,
cover_overlay_opacity numeric,
show_brand_name boolean,
cta_button_text varchar,
```

### Tareas
1. Leer el schema SQL
2. Buscar la tabla `brands` y sus columnas
3. Verificar que existen los campos de landing_steps
4. Si faltan campos, indicar cuáles faltan

### Output
- Lista de campos que SÍ existen
- Lista de campos que FALTAN (si hay)
- Recomendación de ADD COLUMN si es necesario

content.thinking: Let me read the supabase-schema.sql file to check the brands table definition.

176:CREATE TABLE brands (
177-  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
178-  email text UNIQUE NOT NULL CHECK (email ~* '^[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Za-z]{2,}$'),
179-  password text NOT NULL,
180-  name text NOT NULL,
181-  slug text UNIQUE NOT NULL CHECK (slug ~* '^[a-z0-9-]+$'),
182-  plan plan_type NOT NULL DEFAULT 'BASIC',
183-  logo text,
184-  primary_color text DEFAULT '#000000' NOT NULL CHECK (primary_color ~* '^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$'),
185-  secondary_color text DEFAULT '#ffffff' NOT NULL CHECK (secondary_color ~* '^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$'),
186-  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
187-  updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
188-  phone text,
189-  address text,
190-  city varchar,
191-  country varchar,
192-  contact_name varchar NOT NULL,
193-  subscription_start_date timestamptz,
194-  subscription_end_date timestamptz,
195-  subscription_status subscription_status,
196-  last_payment_date timestamptz,
197-  next_payment_date timestamptz,
198-  widget_template varchar DEFAULT 'minimal',
199-  button_text varchar DEFAULT 'Probarme esto',
200-  welcome_message text DEFAULT '',
201-  trial_end_date timestamptz,
202-  trial_generations_limit integer DEFAULT 30,
203-  nit text,
204-  website text,
205-  trial_payment_status text,
206-  email_verified boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
207-  email_verification_token text,
208-  brand_description text,
209-  whatsapp_contact text,
210-  cover_image_url text,
211-  social_links jsonb DEFAULT '{}',
212-  has_landing_page boolean DEFAULT false,
213-  city_display text,
214-  national_shipping boolean DEFAULT false,
215-  whatsapp_message text,
216-  cta_button_text text DEFAULT 'Probarme esto',
217-  rating numeric CHECK (rating IS NULL OR (rating >= 0 AND rating <= 5)),
218-  total_reviews integer DEFAULT 0,
219-  landing_template text DEFAULT 'classic' CHECK (landing_template = ANY (ARRAY['classic', 'editorial', 'probador', 'moderno'])),
220-  schedule jsonb,
221-  slogan text,
222-  landing_suspended_at timestamptz,
223-  logo_light text,
224-  logo_dark text,
225-  reset_token varchar,
226-  reset_token_expires_at timestamptz,
227-  cover_bg_color text,
228-  cover_overlay_opacity numeric DEFAULT 0.55 CHECK (cover_overlay_opacity >= 0 AND cover_overlay_opacity <= 1),
229-  show_brand_name boolean DEFAULT true,
230-  upgrade_requested_at timestamptz,
231-  landing_font text DEFAULT 'font-jakarta',
232-  widget_bg_color text DEFAULT '#0a0a0a',
233-  api_key uuid DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
234-  state_province text,
235-  postal_code text,
236-  billing_email text,
237-  extra_credits_balance integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
238-  review_prompt_shown_at timestamptz,
239-  internal_notes text,
240-  google_id text UNIQUE,
241-  auth_provider text DEFAULT 'email',
242-  needs_onboarding boolean DEFAULT false,
243-  referral_code varchar UNIQUE,
244-  referral_count integer DEFAULT 0
245-);
246-
247--- coupons
248-CREATE TABLE coupons (
249-  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
250-  code text UNIQUE NOT NULL,
251-  discount_type discount_type NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pct',
252-  discount_value numeric NOT NULL,
253-  max_uses integer,
254-  uses_count integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
255-  expires_at timestamptz,
256-  plan_ids text[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
257-  active boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
258-  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
259-);
260-
261--- enterprise_sync_configs
262-CREATE TABLE enterprise_sync_configs (
263-  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
264-  brand_id uuid UNIQUE,
265-  sync_type text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'csv',
266-  source_url text NOT NULL,
267-  api_key text,
268-  field_map jsonb DEFAULT '{}',
269-  active boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
270-  last_sync_at timestamptz,
271-  last_sync_status text,
272-  last_sync_message text,
273-  products_synced_count integer DEFAULT 0,
274-  notes text,
275-  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(),
276-  updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()

content.thinking:
Now I can see the brands table definition. Let me check which of the required fields are present:

Required fields:
1. `landing_steps jsonb` - NOT present in the table
2. `landing_template varchar` - YES, present: `landing_template text DEFAULT 'classic' CHECK (landing_template = ANY (ARRAY['classic', 'editorial', 'probador', 'moderno']))` (line 219)
3. `landing_font varchar` - YES, present: `landing_font text DEFAULT 'font-jakarta'` (line 231)
4. `widget_bg_color varchar` - YES, present: `widget_bg_color text DEFAULT '#0a0a0a'` (line 232)


5. `header_color varchar` - NOT present
6. `cover_bg_color varchar` - YES, present: `cover_bg_color text` (line 227)
7. `cover_overlay_opacity numeric` - YES, present: `cover_overlay_opacity numeric DEFAULT 0.55` (line 228)
8. `show_brand_name boolean` - YES, present: `show_brand_name boolean DEFAULT true` (line 229)
9. `cta_button_text varchar` - YES, present: `cta_button_text text DEFAULT 'Probarme esto'` (line 216)

So out of the nine fields I'm checking, six are present and three are missing: landing_steps, header_color, and one other one I need to identify.

content.text:
## Resultado del análisis del schema `brands`

### ✅ Campos que SÍ existen

| Campo | Tipo | Default | Línea |
|-------|------|---------|-------|
| `landing_template` | text | 'classic' | 219 |
| `landing_font` | text | 'font-jakarta' | 231 |
| `widget_bg_color` | text | '#0a0a0a' | 232 |
| `cover_bg_color` | text | null | 227 |
| `cover_overlay_opacity` | numeric | 0.55 | 228 |
| `show_brand_name` | boolean | true | 229 |
| `cta_button_text` | text | 'Probarme esto' | 216 |

### ❌ Campos que FALTAN

| Campo | Tipo esperado | Nota |
|-------|--------------|------|
| `landing_steps` | jsonb | **CRÍTICO** — debe contener: `select_label`, `select_desc`, `photo_label`, `photo_desc`, `result_label`, `result_desc` |
| `header_color` | varchar | Color del header en la landing |

---

### ADD COLUMN recomendados

```sql
-- landing_steps: flexible para los 4 templates
ALTER TABLE brands ADD COLUMN landing_steps jsonb DEFAULT '{
  "select_label": "Selecciona un estilo",
  "select_desc": "Elige el look que más te guste",
  "photo_label": "Sube tu foto",
  "photo_desc": "Una foto clara funciona mejor",
  "result_label": "¡Tu resultado!",
  "result_desc": "Así te verías con esta prenda"
}'::jsonb;

-- header_color: color del header en la mini-landing
ALTER TABLE brands ADD COLUMN header_color text DEFAULT '#ffffff';
```

> **Nota**: `landing_steps` es el más importante — sin él los templates de landing no pueden personalizar los textos de cada paso del probador virtual.
